task.title: Indicator/Data test-contract alignment
task.scope: narrow test-contract alignment plus governance records

parent.decision: Do not open Indicator/Data source implementation until the existing v1 indicator BusinessException/HTTPException test-contract blocker is aligned.

get_technical_indicators.note: Symbol name is ambiguous in GitNexus; context lookup pinned the intended route function at web/backend/app/api/v1/strategy/indicators.py::get_technical_indicators. No application source was edited.

red.failure: test_v1_indicators_rejects_unsupported_indicator expected module.HTTPException, but current implementation raises app.core.exceptions.BusinessException.

change.summary: Import pytest and BusinessException; replace try/except module.HTTPException assertion with pytest.raises(BusinessException) and status/detail assertions.

decision.next_gate: G2.161 Indicator/Data source implementation authorization package
decision.reason: The focused v1 indicator regression test now matches the canonical BusinessException contract, removing the blocker identified by G2.159.
